# Project Instructions

## Hosting

The site is deployed to a subfolder on the server, not to the domain root. All asset paths (links, images, scripts, stylesheets) must use relative paths — never absolute paths starting with `/`.

## Architecture

- This is a **static site**. Do not introduce any server-side logic (no Node.js servers, no PHP, no server-side rendering, no API routes).
- Use only **vanilla JavaScript** — no frameworks, no libraries, no build tools, no TypeScript, no npm packages in the output.
- All pages are plain HTML, CSS, and vanilla JS.
